title: Artraise 2 Set Replacement for Dyson DC25 Washable Pre-Filter & Post HEPA Filter, Compatible to Part #919171-02 916188-06
features: 【PACKAGE INCLUDS 】2 pcs of DC25 Prefilter & 2 pcs of Post Motor HEPA Filter for Dyson

【PERFECTLY COMPATIBLE 】Designed to fit for DC25 All Floors, DC25 Animal, DC25 Animal Plus, DC25 Animal Total Clean, DC25 Ball, DC25 Blueprint, DC25 Exclusive, DC25 Multi Floor and DC25 Multi Floor Exclusive

【HEALTHIER LIFESTYLE 】 When your Vacuum cleaner has a clogged or dirty air filter it can make your life inconvenient and waste electricity.This filter helps keep our household dust, pollen, and mold spores,absolutely essential For allergy sufferers.Very easy to install,you just need remove your old filter and put this new one in its place

【WASHABLE AND REUSABLE】 It is important to wash these reusable filters regularly to maintain their performance. For optimum performance we recommend you to wash the filter once every month and change the filter every 3 months

【100% SATISFACTION WARRANTY】We sell the high quality product,and we do full refund or new exchange for free if you are not satisfied with your purchase for any reason,please feel free to contact us.We have a professonal after-sale team,we will help you solve all your problem
